checks: simple broad prompts produce a usable creative_brief_v1
simple broad prompts produce a reviewable proposal_bundle_v1
response avoids generic filler and unnecessary clarification
intro restraint and chorus reveal are distinguished when prompted
designer does not flatten differentiated music sections into equal-energy treatment
materially ambiguous broad prompts trigger at most one concise high-value clarification
designer avoids multi-question questionnaires at the minimum viable stage
same input yields stable proposal lines
proposal bundle marks stale on revision drift
proposal reflects stable design principles first
brief or proposal can explain which preference signals influenced the pass
absence of a director profile does not break output generation
designer uses design_scene_context_v1 to reason about broad coverage vs focal refinement
designer references spatial roles without flattening all targets into one undifferentiated pass
designer uses music_design_context_v1 to reason about hold, reveal, escalation, and release
designer proposal avoids flat equal-energy treatment when the music arc is differentiated
sequence-specific requests remain local when evidence is weak
designer does not imply that one local exception rewrites the broader director profile
